description: Rebrand 'Gather' to 'Gather Lists' across logos, UI, metadata, iOS config, and regenerate all assets

userStories.title: Save New All-Variants SVG Reference File
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the new designer-provided all-variants SVG saved as the reference file so that the master design reference is up to date
acceptanceCriteria: New all-variants SVG saved to public/logo/gather-logo-all-variants.svg
userStories.notes: Pre-completed by Planner. File already saved.

userStories.title: Extract and Replace Logo SVG Files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the individual logo SVG files extracted from the all-variants SVG so that each logo variant file contains the updated 'Gather Lists' two-tone treatment
acceptanceCriteria: public/logo/icon-only.svg — NO CHANGE NEEDED. Current file matches the APP ICON section exactly. Leave as-is.
public/logo/icon-name.svg — Replace with ICON + NAME section from all-variants SVG. Text y attribute 118→126, single <text>Gather</text> → tspan treatment with 'Lists'
public/logo/icon-name-tagline.svg — Replace with FULL LOGO WITH TAGLINE section. Single <text>Gather</text> → tspan treatment with 'Lists'
public/logo/stacked.svg — Replace with STACKED / CENTERED section. Single <text>Gather</text> → tspan treatment with 'Lists'. Tagline x: 450→463
Each file is a valid standalone SVG with its own viewBox, defs, gradients, and filters
SVG content comes directly from the designer's all-variants file — do NOT hand-modify coordinates or regenerate
viewBox values: icon-only '76 60 148 148' (unchanged), icon-name '296 55 310 110', icon-name-tagline '184 236 520 108', stacked '310 410 280 225' (height 210→225 for new tagline y=621)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: All three SVGs updated with two-tone Gather Lists tspan treatment from designer's all-variants SVG
userStories.testIntensityReason: SVG extraction must produce valid standalone files; incorrect defs/viewBox would break rendering

userStories.title: Update HTML Page Title and Meta Tags
userStories.description: As a user, I want the browser tab and meta tags to say 'Gather Lists' so that the app name is consistent everywhere
acceptanceCriteria: index.html <title> → 'Gather Lists'
index.html <meta name='description'> → 'Gather Lists — your lists, meals, and more.'
index.html <meta name='apple-mobile-web-app-title'> → 'Gather Lists'
Lint passes
userStories.notes: index.html title + meta tags updated to Gather Lists

userStories.title: Update Capacitor App Name
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Capacitor config to use 'Gather Lists' so that the native iOS app displays the correct name
acceptanceCriteria: capacitor.config.ts → appName: 'Gather Lists'
Lint passes
userStories.notes: capacitor.config.ts appName updated to Gather Lists

userStories.title: Update iOS Display Name
userStories.description: As a user, I want the iOS home screen to show 'Gather Lists' under the app icon so that the app name matches the App Store listing
acceptanceCriteria: ios/App/App/Info.plist → CFBundleDisplayName → 'Gather Lists'
userStories.notes: Info.plist CFBundleDisplayName updated to Gather Lists

userStories.title: Update Desktop Header Branding

acceptanceCriteria: Replace logoGroup internals (logoRow with icon-only.svg img + h1 + tagline span) with a single

The

can wrap the for semantic heading:
Style the img to fit the header appropriately (similar height to current icon+text combo, roughly 42–48px tall)
Remove now-unused .logoRow, .logoIcon, .logo, .tagline CSS rules from App.module.css if no longer referenced anywhere
Visually verify the header looks clean with the SVG logo on both light and dark themes
Lint passes
Works in both light and dark mode

for semantics if appropriate, or use a visually hidden

alongside the img for accessibility

'Install Gather' → 'Install Gather Lists'
Tagline 'Gather your lists, meals, and more.' remains unchanged

userStories.title: Update Privacy Policy

acceptanceCriteria: public/privacy.html <title> → 'Privacy Policy — Gather Lists'
'Back to Gather' → 'Back to Gather Lists'
'Gather ("we", "our", "the app")' → 'Gather Lists ("we", "our", "the app")'
'Gather does not knowingly collect data...' → 'Gather Lists does not knowingly collect data...'

Description opening: 'Gather Lists is your intelligent grocery shopping companion...'

userStories.title: Update generate-icons.js Comment
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the icon generation script's JSDoc comment to reference 'Gather Lists' so that the code documentation is accurate
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/generate-icons.js line 3 comment: 'Gather Lists logo SVG' (or similar)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: JSDoc comment updated to reference Gather Lists

userStories.title: Update Splash Screen Generation for Two-Tone Text
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the splash screen dark-mode text color override to handle the new two-tone treatment so that dark splash screens render correctly with the 'Lists' tspan
acceptanceCriteria: Review scripts/generate-icons.js createStackedSplashSvg dark mode logic
Current dark mode replaces fill='#3D7A63' → white and fill='#85BFA8' → '#E0E0E0'
Verify this still works correctly with the new SVG structure (tspan elements with fill='#85BFA8')
If the new stacked SVG has fill='#85BFA8' on the 'Lists' tspan AND on the tagline, the existing regex replacement should handle both — verify and adjust if needed
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Verified: dark mode regex in createStackedSplashSvg correctly handles tspan structure. fill="#3D7A63" on parent <text> catches Gather text, fill="#85BFA8" /g catches both Lists tspan and tagline text. No code changes needed.
userStories.testIntensityReason: Regex replacement must handle new tspan structure without breaking dark mode rendering

userStories.title: Regenerate PWA and iOS Assets
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all generated assets rebuilt from the updated SVGs so that PWA icons, Capacitor icons, and splash screens reflect the 'Gather Lists' branding
acceptanceCriteria: Run 'node scripts/generate-icons.js' — regenerates PWA icons (64/192/512), Capacitor source PNGs (icon-only.png, icon-foreground.png), splash screens (splash.png, splash-dark.png)
Run 'npm run build && npx cap sync ios' — syncs web assets to iOS project
Run 'npx capacitor-assets generate --ios' — rebuilds Xcode asset catalog from source PNGs
Visually verify splash.png shows 'Gather Lists' with two-tone treatment
Visually verify splash-dark.png shows 'Gather Lists' with white 'Gather' + light gray 'Lists'
userStories.testIntensityReason: Asset pipeline must produce correct PNGs from new SVGs; visual verification required

userStories.title: Update Style Guide (Optional)

acceptanceCriteria: public/logo/gather-style-guide.html — update all 'Gather' name references to 'Gather Lists' where it refers to the app name
